pi_items.source: Task requirement analysis: includes date calculations (basic-intermediate), nested IF statements (intermediate), conditional formatting (intermediate), SUM aggregation (basic), data sorting (intermediate), currency formatting (basic)
Task requires multiple formulas: TODAY() calculation, nested IF logic, SUM aggregation, comparison logic
Task explicitly requires date calculations: TODAY() - TODAY() formula for days until expiration
TODAY() function is required in Column G: =C2-TODAY() formula (README.md lines 34-36, setup_task.sh line 177)
Task requires two conditional formatting applications: Status column (red for URGENT, dark red for EXPIRED) and CE Status column (yellow for INCOMPLETE)
Task requires sorting data by Days Until Expiration in ascending order (earliest expiration first) - README.md lines 70-74
Task involves professional healthcare certifications (RN License, BLS, ACLS, PALS, Wound Care, CNS, IV Therapy) with real issuing organizations
Task creates compliance dashboard for tracking certification renewals and expiration urgency - README.md states 'compliance tracking used in high-stakes professional environments'
Task explicitly requires nested IF formula for status categorization: =IF(G2<0,"EXPIRED",IF(G2<90,"URGENT",IF(G2<365,"CURRENT","FUTURE"))) - README.md line 39, setup_task.sh line 177

Breaking down 8 required actions: Days column (2), Status column (2), Status formatting (3), Total cost formula (2), CE Status column (2), CE formatting (2), Sorting (2) = 15 steps total, reasonably estimated as ~12 major steps
Task requires =C2-TODAY() formula to calculate days until expiration, demonstrating date arithmetic
TODAY() function returns current date and is used in the Days Until Expiration calculation formula
Task requires nested IF formula with 3 levels of nesting for EXPIRED/URGENT/CURRENT/FUTURE categorization - README.md line 39
Task requires applying conditional formatting rules to Status column (colors) and CE Status column (yellow highlight) - README.md lines 47-52, 65-68
Task requires =SUM(D2:D[last_row]) formula to aggregate total renewal costs across all certifications - README.md lines 55-58
Task requires selecting entire data range and sorting by Days Until Expiration column in ascending order - README.md lines 70-74
Task requires formatting renewal costs as currency ($150, $75, $180, etc.) and formatting the SUM total - setup_task.sh lines 59-67 show currency values; README.md line 57 mentions currency format
Task requires =IF(F2>=E2,"Complete","INCOMPLETE") formula comparing CE Credits Completed vs Required - README.md line 61
setup_task.sh lines 14-23 create CSV with hardcoded data; lines 43-107 create ODS with Python script; 7 certifications with realistic but synthetic data

pi_items.verified_value: Organizations are real, certifications are real
pi_items.source: Verified through web search: BLS (Basic Life Support) from American Heart Association (cpr.heart.org), WOCN (Wound, Ostomy and Continence Nursing) from WOCNCB (wocncb.org). Other certifications (ACLS, PALS, ANCC Clinical Nurse Specialist, INS IV Therapy) are established real credentials
setup_task.sh lines 59-67 show exactly 7 certification records in the hardcoded data

pi_items.verified_value: 6 input columns: Certification Name, Issuing Body, Expiration Date, Renewal Cost, CE Credits Required, CE Credits Completed
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 58 defines the headers; task requires adding 3 output columns (Days, Status, CE Status) for a total of 9 columns

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task involving a professional certification renewal tracking spreadsheet with 7 realistic healthcare certifications (RN License, BLS, ACLS, PALS, Wound Care Specialist, Clinical Nurse Specialist, IV Therapy) from real organizations (American Heart Association, WOCN, ANCC, INS). The task requires applying formulas including TODAY() date calculations, nested IF statements for status categorization (EXPIRED/URGENT/CURRENT/FUTURE), SUM aggregation for costs, conditional formatting with color coding, and sorting by urgency. All metadata claims regarding difficulty (medium), 8 required skills, estimated 12 steps, and 8 tags are verified as accurate. The data is synthetic (hardcoded in setup_task.sh) but uses realistic certification names, organizations, costs ($75-$395), and CE credit requirements. The verifier checks 8 criteria with a 75% pass threshold (6/8).
